response.justification: Bogdan possesses a broad range of software development experience and demonstrated strong communication skills through his workshops and talks. He also has some relevant exposure to investment practices. However, the role specifically requires 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development on the Windows platform, and his resume only indicates a brief period of C/C++ work, with C++ not even listed in his core skills. This critical discrepancy makes him unsuitable for the position.
strengths: Diverse software development experience across multiple platforms and languages.
Demonstrated experience in financial/investment-related contexts at RIDE Capital.
Proven strong communication skills through organizing workshops and talks.
concerns: Significantly lacking in the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ development experience.
Limited explicit hands-on C++ experience on the Windows platform.
No specific mention of SQL Server or Oracle, with more focus on NoSQL (MongoDB).
